# services.openthread-border-router

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.openthread-border-router`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.openthread-border-router.backboneInterfaces` | `list of string` | The network interfaces on which to advertise the thread ipv6 mesh prefix. Can be specified multiple times. |
| `services.openthread-border-router.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the OpenThread Border Router. |
| `services.openthread-border-router.extraArgs` | `list of string` | Extra arguments to pass to the otbr-agent daemon. |
| `services.openthread-border-router.interfaceName` | `string` | The network interface to create for thread packets. |
| `services.openthread-border-router.logLevel` | `one of "alert", "crit", "debug", "emerg", "err", "info", "notice", "warning"` | The level to use when logging messages. |
| `services.openthread-border-router.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to open the firewall for the REST API and web interface ports. |
| `services.openthread-border-router.package` | `package` | The openthread-border-router package to use. |
| `services.openthread-border-router.radio.baudRate` | `positive integer, meaning >0` | The baud rate of the radio device. Ignored if {option}`services.openthread-border-router.radio.url` is set. |
| `services.openthread-border-router.radio.device` | `null or absolute path` | The device name of the serial port of the radio device. Ignored if {option}`services.openthread-border-router.radio.url` is set. |
| `services.openthread-border-router.radio.extraDevices` | `list of string` | Extra devices to add to the radio device. |
| `services.openthread-border-router.radio.flowControl` | `boolean` | Enable hardware flow control. Ignored if {option}`services.openthread-border-router.radio.url` is set. |
| `services.openthread-border-router.radio.url` | `null or string` | The URL of the radio device to use. |
| `services.openthread-border-router.radio.urlQueryString` | `string` | Extra URL query string parameters. Ignored if {option}`services.openthread-border-router.radio.url` is set. |
| `services.openthread-border-router.rest.listenAddress` | `string` | The address on which to listen for REST API requests. |
| `services.openthread-border-router.rest.listenPort` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port on which to listen for REST API requests. Warning: the web interface relies on this value being set to 8081. |
| `services.openthread-border-router.web.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the web interface. |
| `services.openthread-border-router.web.listenAddress` | `string` | The address on which the web interface should listen. |
| `services.openthread-border-router.web.listenPort` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port on which the web interface should listen. |
